landing.title: OpenFarmPlanner
landing.statusLine: Active beta • continuous improvements • feedback welcome
landing.headline: Crop planning for vegetable farms without spreadsheet chaos.
landing.subtitle: Plan crops, areas, and timelines with clarity — for farms, CSA, and small teams.
landing.description: OpenFarmPlanner supports daily planning and documentation. The app is actively developed, transparently maintained, and continuously improved with user feedback.

preview.title: Product preview
preview.subtitle: How planning looks in day-to-day work
preview.note: Preview placeholder: a real in-app screenshot can be embedded here later.

clarity.title: More clarity
clarity.description: Key planning information is centralized and easy to scan.

collaboration.title: Better collaboration
collaboration.description: Teams work from the same source of truth with fewer misunderstandings.

continuousImprovement.title: Active improvement
continuousImprovement.description: Field feedback directly informs upcoming improvements.

features.title: What OpenFarmPlanner supports
features.subtitle: Functions are designed around practical planning steps — structured and easy to understand.

cultures.title: Manage crops
cultures.description: Maintain crop data centrally and use it consistently across the project.

areas.title: Organize areas
areas.description: Structure beds and growing areas clearly and traceably.

timelines.title: Plan timelines
timelines.description: Coordinate sowing, planting, and further steps along realistic windows.

teams.title: Work as a team
teams.description: Share planning status transparently and improve it together.

feedback.title: Practical feedback
feedback.description: Real-world input matters most: ideas, bug reports, and improvement suggestions are always welcome.

items.item1: Feedback on usability and planning flow

openSource.title: Open source builds trust
openSource.description: Source code is publicly available. Progress is transparent, and contributions via issues or pull requests are welcome.

finalCta.title: Start planning now
finalCta.description: Try OpenFarmPlanner directly in the browser or create an account to join ongoing development.

footer.brandText: Calm, modern, and transparent crop planning in active beta.
footer.contactText: Questions, feedback, and bug reports are welcome via email.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimer: These details are based on the current draft status (March 2026). Please complete legal review before going live.

controller.title: Controller
controller.content:
Responsible for data processing on this website:

Martin Stipsitz
Burgenlandstraße 44A / 9
9500 Villach
Austria

Email: info@openfarmplanner.org

generalNotice.title: General information on data processing
generalNotice.content:
We take the protection of your personal data seriously. We process your data confidentially and in accordance with applicable data protection laws and this privacy policy.

Using OpenFarmPlanner is generally possible without providing personal data. If personal data is collected (for example during registration), this is done on a voluntary basis.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content:
This website is hosted by:

Uberspace GmbH
Kaiserstraße 15
55116 Mainz
Germany

When you visit the website, the server automatically records:

bullets.requestTime: Date and time of the request

registration.title: Registration and user account
registration.content: To use OpenFarmPlanner, you can create a user account. The following data may be processed:
registration.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract)

projectData.title: Project and application data
projectData.content: Within the application, users can store the following data:

emailCommunication.title: Email communication
emailCommunication.content: We use your email address for:

logFiles.title: Log files
logFiles.content: Technical log files are stored to ensure reliable operation. These may include:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: OpenFarmPlanner uses technically necessary cookies to ensure core functionality.

dataSharing.title: Data sharing
dataSharing.content: Your data is not shared with third parties, except where necessary for contractual performance or where legally required.

storageDuration.title: Storage duration
storageDuration.content: Your data is stored as long as your user account exists. You can request account deletion at any time.

complaint.title: Right to lodge a complaint
complaint.content:
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the data protection authority:

Austrian Data Protection Authority
Barichgasse 40-42
1030 Vienna
https://www.dsb.gv.at

changes.title: Changes to this privacy policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to adjust this privacy policy to reflect new features or legal requirements.
